summary: Reposted local television news segment about rising trade-school enrollment. The frame shows a bearded man in a cap and a red t-shirt seated at a workbench using a desktop computer and laptop in a technical workshop. An Eyewitness News lower-third reads 'GROWING ENROLLMENT AT TRADE SCHOOLS' with an ABC '5' station bug and an on-screen clock and temperature; a caption reads 'THEY WANT TO GET IN, LEARN.' The audio is a reporter describing increased interest in trade programs.

script.scene: Bearded man in a cap and red shirt works at a computer in a workshop; chyron 'GROWING ENROLLMENT AT TRADE SCHOOLS,' caption 'THEY WANT TO GET IN, LEARN.'
